# PERF-189 positive: Body.Close before io.Copy(io.Discard, body) — wrong order
lang: go
file: PERF-189-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	resp, _ := http.Get("https://example.com")
	resp.Body.Close()
	io.Copy(io.Discard, resp.Body)
}
